raw_consumer_statement:
Wix a company that hosts websites.

A charge went through my credit card.I told the credit card company I did not approve that or sign it.I would never do that because It would be over my credit limit on my credit card.

Unauthorized charges on my credit card I thought was going to be an easy thing to resolve.They said they would handle it and talk to the company, and they haven't done anything.I asked to talk to someone in the United States they wouldn't tell me where they were.I was trying to get just a local contact.This is a scam, I explained to them that scamers are very good at what they do.

I did not authorize {$810.00} on a citi credit card.I don't understand why the credit card company is so negative to a paying customer. Never missed a payment.

They should turn down the credit card transaction that I did not approve!!

I explained to him that they're supposed to be looking out for me.And they said, yes, sir we are, My reply No, you're not and please take care of this issue on my credit card. 

Thank you. 
XXXX XXXX
